channel.title: GitHub WebAssembly Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of WebAssembly in GitHub

item.title: makepad/makepad
item.description: Makepad is a creative software development platform for Rust that compiles to wasm/webGL, osx/metal, windows/dx11 linux/opengl

item.title: WebAssembly/memory-control
item.description: A proposal to introduce finer grained control of WebAssembly memory.
